title: Jammed
description:
Draw roads. Run the simulation. Fix the traffic.Draw roads and bridges, connect growing districts, and watch your city come alive. Design efficient interchanges and prevent your city from becoming Jammed.

Draw Your Road NetworkPlace districts and draw one-way roads and bridges by hand. Every connection changes how traffic moves through your city.

Watch Traffic Come AliveStart the simulation and watch hundreds of vehicles travel through your network in real time. Efficient roads keep the city moving. Bad designs create bottlenecks and traffic jams.

A Growing City Never StopsNew districts appear as you play. Roads that worked minutes ago may suddenly become overloaded. Redesign intersections, reroute traffic, and keep the city moving.

Build Massive InterchangesConnect islands, cross rivers, and create increasingly complex road systems across handcrafted maps.

Features• Draw one-way roads freely on the map

• Build bridges to cross rivers and connect islands

• Watch traffic flow through your network in real time

• Unlock new districts as your city grows

• Multiple handcrafted maps

• Steam Achievements and Leaderboards

• Export your best traffic solutions as GIFs
description_short: You are a traffic engineer. Draw roads and bridges, connect growing districts, and watch your city come alive. Design efficient interchanges and avoid traffic jams.
